TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Minami, title = Minami, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Minami} }

S.FORM: alang Minami ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Genhe'I go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 47 buwan, 148 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 96% kyan ku 142 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 4% kyan ku 6 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 91%, Amis 1%, Rukay 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 3%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Minami hya' ga Kalisahan. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Minami ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Minami ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Minami ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Genhe'I go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 47 buwan, 148 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 96% kyan ku 142 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 4% kyan ku 6 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 91%, Amis 1%, Rukay 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 3%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Minami hya' ga Kalisahan. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Minami ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Minami ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ minami ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu ɣenħeʔi ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, βunun **%, amis~ɕ *%, rukaj *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkrajaʔ na minami ħjaʔ ɣa kalis~ɕaħan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ minami ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ minami ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
